results.title: The Nearly Free Electronic Signature API That Just Works | Firma.dev Blog
results.content:
Firma.dev changes that. At €0.029 per envelope with no minimums, no contracts, and no seat-based pricing, Firma.dev is the nearly free electronic signature API. It’s fully featured, legally valid in the U.S. and EU, and built for developers who want integration in hours—not weeks.

## Why Electronic Signatures Are So Expensive

Most providers price electronic signatures like enterprise software:

 DocuSign: Typically €1+ per envelope, plus required monthly plans.
 Adobe Sign: Similar structure, per-seat licensing, with volume tiers.
 Others: Often hide API access behind higher subscription levels. [...] ## Conclusion

Firma.dev is the first nearly free electronic signature API that combines affordability, developer speed, and global legal validity. No seat-based pricing, no contracts, no friction.

👉 Get started with Firma.dev today - no credit card required.

1. Heading

## Related articles

Our platform is designed to empower businesses of all sizes to work smarter and achieve their goals with confidence.

### The Hidden Costs of Enterprise E-Signature PlatformsFeb 23, 2025

### DocuSign Pricing vs Firma.dev: How SaaS Startups Save 80%+ on E-Signatures

Feb 10, 2026 [...] ## Built for Developers

Firma.dev isn’t a retrofitted enterprise portal—it’s an API-first platform designed for SaaS teams:

 REST API with simple endpoints
 Embedded editors for templates and signing
 Integration in hours, not weeks
 Clear docs: Get started with Firma.dev Docs

You focus on your product. Firma.dev handles infrastructure, scaling, and compliance.

## Legal Validity Across the U.S. and EU

Adding electronic signatures to your product isn’t just about UX. You need legal enforceability and data protection:

 U.S.: ESIGN Act, UETA, HIPAA, FDA 21 CFR Part 11
 EU/UK: eIDAS (SES, AdES), GDPR
 Security: Built around SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria and ISO/IEC 27001 standards

Firma.dev aligns with these frameworks, so you can embed signatures without legal gaps.

Quão fácil é integrar a Firma.dev na minha aplicação?

Extremamente fácil. Com a nossa API REST voltada para desenvolvedores e documentação clara, a maioria das equipes integra-se em menos de uma hora. Pode começar a testar gratuitamente imediatamente.

What do you think? …

Derick Dorner
Firma.dev

Firma.dev

Hey Product Hunt, Derick here, co-founder of Firma.dev.

We built Firma.dev because every e-signature API we tried was either priced for enterprises or was an end-user app with an API bolted on as an afterthought. We wanted the opposite: an API-first product where signing is something you integrate in an afternoon, not a procurement cycle.

💸 Pricing. €0.029 per envelope, about 3¢, pay-as-you-go with no minimums or contracts. DocuSign can run $4-5 for a single envelope, so for most teams that's around 99% less. [...] 🤖 Built for AI-assisted development. We ship two MCP servers, one for our docs and one for the API itself with 84 tools, so coding agents generate accurate Firma.dev integration code and can even manage signing requests directly. We have a guide for Claude Code, plus Antigravity, Cursor, Lovable and the rest in our docs.

🌍 Legality. Designed to support the frameworks that matter, and e-signatures are legally recognized in 55+ countries.

🔑 Try it free. There's a sandbox key with real documents and unlimited usage, so you can test the whole flow before paying anything. No demos, no sales calls.

We'd love your feedback, especially from anyone who's fought with e-signature integrations before. I'll be around all day to answer questions.

Derick [...] Firma.dev

# Firma.dev E-signature API

Only €0.029 per envelope (or about 3 cents USD), no minimums, no contracts. Made for SaaS to embed multi-team signature flows fast.

## ​ What is Firma?

Firma provides hosted signing flows and an embeddable template editor so you can add document signing to your product with minimal build effort. You can: [...] Create siloed, secure workspaces for each of your customers so their data stays separated.
 Embed a template editor so users can design documents from inside your app.
 Embed the signing experience so signers can sign without leaving your interface.
 Use workflows to enable native functionality within your app, so that you have a fully white-labeled e-signature experience.

results.title: How to Keep Your E-Signatures Secure Without Adding Complexity | Firma.dev Blog
results.content:
## How Firma.dev Keeps You Secure Without the Headaches

Firma.dev was built with security-first principles from day one and runs on a modern architecture that combines the reliability of AWS infrastructure with the security controls of PostgreSQL-based systems.

1. ### Encryption Standards

All documents and metadata are encrypted at rest using AES-256. Data in transit is secured with TLS 1.2+, ensuring that no information can be intercepted. Row-level security and strict access control policies ensure data isolation and integrity.

1. ### Key Management

Encryption keys are securely managed within the infrastructure, following best practices for storage and isolation.

1. ### Authentication and Access Control [...] 1. ### Tamper-Proof Audit Trails

Every signature event is logged with timestamps, IP addresses, and cryptographic checks to guarantee legal defensibility. Logs are immutable and can be retrieved via the API for auditing purposes.

Integration is fast with a simple REST API. No heavy SDKs, no multi-week onboarding.

## Summary

Security does not need to be complicated or expensive. Firma.dev delivers enterprise-grade protection, built on secure infrastructure and proven standards, without the friction of traditional providers. Focus on shipping your product while we handle compliance and security.

Ready to make e-signatures both secure and simple? Get started with Firma.dev for free. No credit card required.

1. Heading

## Related articles [...] 1. ### Authentication and Access Control

Integration is protected through API key-based authentication for simplicity and security. Role-based access controls allow teams to define who can create, send, and view documents.

1. ### Data Residency

All data is hosted in EU-compliant environments by default, ensuring full alignment with GDPR and other regional data protection laws.

1. ### Compliance Certifications

Firma meets SOC 2 standards, adheres to GDPR, supports HIPAA requirements for healthcare-related data, and aligns with eIDAS for European electronic signature regulations.

1. ### Tamper-Proof Audit Trails

Compliance [...] ## Billed in your currency. No conversion surprises.

Firma.dev prices are listed in euros, but you're always billed in your local currency. We support 30+ currencies including USD, GBP, CAD, AUD, BRL, JPY, and more. Your payment processor handles the conversion at the current rate, so your invoice shows up in the currency you actually use.

For US customers, that works out to roughly 3 cents per envelope depending on the exchange rate. No markups on our end.

results.title: Privacy policy – Firma
results.content:
## 9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. We will post the revised policy here and update the "Last updated" date.

## 10. Contact Us

If you have questions or wish to exercise your rights, email us at support@firma.dev or mail: [...] Firma, (1600 Holdings LLC), ("Firma," "we," "us" or "our"), provides e-signature and document workflow services exclusively to business customers ("you," "your," or "Customer"). This Privacy Policy describes the categories of data we collect, how we use it, and your rights under applicable laws, including GDPR.

## 1. Data We Collect

### a. Personal Data

 Customer Administrators & Developers

  + Name, email, company, job title
  + API keys, account credentials, and support tickets
 End-User Signers (processed on your behalf)

  + Name, email, signature data

### b. Service Data

 Signed documents (PDF/DOCX) and templates
 Audit trails, certificates of completion
 Billing & invoicing records
 Usage logs (envelope creation, signature events)

## 2. How We Use Your Data
